objective: Stabilize segmentation/mapping and dictionary flow for real KO content before scaling to more languages.

notes: Contract and data-shape tasks are strictly sequential.
Mapping track and dictionary track can run in parallel after shared staging format is frozen.
Pipeline/release/frontend gates are sequential after both tracks converge.

tasks.title: Freeze ID/Path policy and mapping contracts
tasks.goal: Prevent rework by locking canonical ID and fs-safe path behavior.
actions: Lock canonical business IDs to colon format (for example ko:n-friend:01).
Lock filesystem-safe IDs to double underscore format (for example ko__n-friend__01) for path mapping only.
Document that fs_safe_id is optional and non-canonical.
Add/confirm schema examples for core and i18n with both id and fs_safe_id.
deliverables: Updated contract doc for ID policy
Schema examples validating canonical id + fs_safe_id coexistence
acceptance: Validator passes for example_dictionary_core, dictionary_i18n, grammar_core, grammar_i18n.
Contract explicitly states fs_safe_id must not be used for business lookup.

tasks.title: Define staging data model for token and mapping workflow
tasks.goal: Create one stable handoff format between segmentation and dictionary filling.
actions: Create staging files: token_candidates.jsonl, mapping_accepted.jsonl, mapping_conflicts.jsonl.
Define required fields (surface, source_ref, context, confidence, candidate_atom_ids, final_atom_id, resolver).
Add README for staging semantics and conflict resolution policy.
Add command docs for regenerate/append/review flows.
acceptance: Staging files can be regenerated deterministically from same source input.
Schema/shape checks fail on missing required fields.

tasks.title: Build segmentation and auto-mapping pipeline
tasks.goal: Generate high-confidence mapping_accepted and isolate uncertain tokens to conflicts.
actions: Run token extraction on dialogue source and generate token_candidates with source_ref traceability.
Apply auto-mapping heuristics using legacy map + lemma rules + override tables.
Emit high-confidence rows to mapping_accepted and low-confidence/multi-candidate rows to mapping_conflicts.
Add unresolved ratio and duplicate-final-id checks.
acceptance: No duplicate final mapping for same source_ref token occurrence.
Conflict list is explicit and reviewable (not silently dropped).

tasks.title: Add human review loop for low-confidence conflicts
tasks.goal: Keep manual review bounded and auditable.
actions: Create review input/export format for mapping_conflicts.
Implement apply-reviewed-mappings command that appends to mapping_accepted with reviewer metadata.
Enforce precedence: manual override > auto-map.
Implement rules for '쯤' and generic numeric counters to replace manual mappings like '3개쯤', '10분'.
Phase out 'ko:phrase:*' emergency mappings (e.g., '가주실', '찾겠죠') by implementing missing grammar rules.
acceptance: Reviewed conflicts become deterministic accepted mappings.
Each accepted manual decision includes reviewer + timestamp + rationale.

tasks.title: Systematic Grammar Rules Audit (Lesson v3)
tasks.goal: Ensure all grammar points taught in lessons are supported by Rules Engine.
actions: Audit docs/lesson_v3/grammar/ level 0-4 for missing patterns (e.g., ~지도, ~겠죠).
Implement missing rules in engine/rules/ and verify with unit tests.
Verify pipeline coverage for audited patterns.
deliverables: Audit report of missing vs. supported grammar points
New rule JSON files in engine/rules/
acceptance: All grammar points in Level 0-1 lessons are fully parsed by Rules Engine.
Zero 'emergency' mappings needed for audited grammar patterns.

tasks.title: Apply POS Audit Fixes and Clean Legacy Mapping
tasks.goal: Apply manual review findings (KO-GEMINI-05) and remove redundant phrase mappings.
actions: Incorporate POS decisions from KO-GEMINI-05 patch backlog (MOVE/DUAL).
Transfer -되다 verbs from mapping_adjectives to mapping_verbs.
Remove legacy ko:phrase:* band-aids from mapping files that are now handled by rules.
Execute stage2 gates to verify no regression in coverage.
acceptance: Backlog from KO-GEMINI-05 is 100% applied.
Zero redundant ko:phrase mappings remain in base dictionary.
Stage2 and QA metrics remain stable or improve.

tasks.title: Lock A1 Segmentation Golden Set
actions: Ingest A1 golden file (specifically completing L11-20).
Implement scripts/tests/verify_golden.py.
Add CI gate for A1 zero-deviation.
acceptance: Pipeline fails on A1 segmentation change.

tasks.title: Lock A2 Segmentation Golden Set
actions: Establish A2 golden baseline (25 lessons synced to gold_standards/dialogue/A2/).
Lock A2 in verify_golden.py (Integration with qa_gate.py).
acceptance: Pipeline fails on A2 deviation.

tasks.title: Lock B1 Segmentation Golden Set
actions: Establish B1 golden baseline (B1-01 to B1-25 audited).
Reinforce Rules Engine for high-frequency B1 patterns (텐데, 하셔, 하셨습니다, 습니다만).
Lock B1 in verify_golden.py via qa_gate system.
acceptance: qa_gate passed for B1 Level (B1-01 to B1-25).
Residual ratio reduced via rule enhancement.

tasks.title: Build TOPIK 3000 base dictionary + course plugin
tasks.goal: Two-layer dictionary: TOPIK 3000 as base, course-specific gaps as plugin.

phases.title: Rewrite import_vocabulary.py → categorized mapping_*.json
actions: Parse TOPIK 1000 + 2000 + 3000 markdown files.
POS heuristic: verb/adjective/noun/adverb classification.
Output 4 categorized files: mapping_nouns/verbs/adjectives/misc.json.

phases.title: Delete legacy & redundant entries
actions: Delete monolithic mapping.json.
Remove all ko:phrase:* band-aids from mapping_misc.json.
Remove conjugated surface forms (handled by rules).
Remove redundant N+助詞 combos (handled by rules engine).

phases.title: Pipeline gap analysis
actions: Run stage2_executor.py with TOPIK 3000 base only.
Collect unresolved tokens → gap report.
Classify gaps: food/drink, loanwords, colloquial, counters.

phases.title: Generate mapping_course.json from gaps
actions: Auto-generate mapping_course.json from gap report.
Manual review before commit.
Keep mapping_proper.json and mapping_names.json as-is.

acceptance: All TOPIK 3000 lemmas exist in categorized mapping files.
Monolithic mapping.json is deleted.
Pipeline completes with TOPIK 3000 base + course plugin.

tasks.title: Fill dictionary i18n zh_tw and add coverage gates
tasks.goal: Complete learner-language layer without mutating core fields.
actions: Generate i18n skeleton ONLY from atom IDs actually present in course content (active lemmas extracted from stage2 handoff).
Fill zh_tw gloss/definition fields and keep IDs aligned.
Add coverage report: translated, missing, stale IDs (scoped to active set).
Fail gate when missing translation ratio exceeds threshold for active set.
acceptance: i18n schema validation passes.
Coverage threshold is enforced in CI/smoke flow.

tasks.title: Implement dual-layer POS contract for KO dictionary base
tasks.goal: Enforce both teaching POS and universal POS for base dictionary entries instead of single-layer script-only classification.
actions: Define canonical dual-layer POS data shape for KO base dictionary assets (teaching pos + universal upos) while keeping resolver IDs stable.
Extend import_vocabulary.py output path to generate dual-layer POS metadata from TOPIK source and manual review decisions.
Add validator and consistency checks: file bucket POS vs metadata POS, duplicate lemma cross-POS handling, and required upos coverage.
Wire dual-layer POS checks into stage2 and QA reporting so regressions fail fast.
deliverables: Dual-layer POS contract doc and sample payload
Generated dual-layer POS metadata artifact for i18n/base
Validation script + QA summary section for POS-layer consistency
acceptance: Every TOPIK3000 base lemma has both teaching POS and UPOS metadata.
Known cross-POS lemmas are explicitly labeled as dual-POS or corrected to a single POS with evidence.
Stage/QA checks fail on missing UPOS or inconsistent POS layer mapping.

tasks.title: Inject missing Phrase dictionary meanings
tasks.goal: Ensure items from mapping_phrase.json have translation definitions generated/injected into the i18n dictionary so they display correctly in the frontend.
actions: Audit mapping_phrase.json for phrases that lack meanings in dict_ko_zh_tw.json (e.g., ko_PHRASE_안녕하세요).
Update the dictionary build pipeline to pull phrase meanings from translation sources or mapping metadata.
Generate and verify the updated dict_ko_zh_tw.json.
acceptance: Common phrases like '안녕하세요' display correct translations in the Frontend without hardcoded fallbacks.

tasks.title: Integrate mapping and dictionary quality gates into content-pipeline
actions: Add checks: duplicate IDs, unresolved token ratio, empty senses, i18n coverage threshold.
Fail build when any hard gate fails.
Publish machine-readable QA summary artifact per run.
acceptance: Smoke test fails correctly on injected bad sample.
Smoke test passes on current KO baseline.

tasks.title: Run full KO->release->frontend verification with real data
tasks.goal: Confirm end-to-end pipeline stability after flow rewrite.
actions: Run content-ko extract/map/review/apply/build-dictionary sequence.
Run content-pipeline build and smoke test with new QA gates.
Run release-aggregator collect + manifest generation.
Run frontend sync and dictionary-related integration tests.
acceptance: End-to-end run succeeds without manual patching in middle steps.
Frontend dictionary lookup path passes integration tests.

gemini_prompt_template: 請讀取 MAPPING_DICTIONARY_TASKS.json，執行任務 {TASK_ID}。完成後請用 reporting_format 回報，並附上可重現命令與測試結果。若任務屬於 parallel_groups，請明確標註是否可與另一任務並行。
